evals.name: luxury-coffee-login
evals.prompt: I want a mobile login page for a luxury coffee shop app. It should feel premium and warm.
evals.expected_output: A modern HTML/CSS mobile login screen with warm colors, clear typography, and a premium feel.

evals.name: inventory-list-mobile
evals.prompt: Make this simple inventory list page mobile friendly. It has product name, stock count, and a 'transfer' button. Focus on ease of use for warehouse workers.
evals.expected_output: A functional and clean mobile-friendly inventory list with large tap targets and clear layout.

evals.name: fitness-dashboard
evals.prompt: Design a mobile dashboard for a fitness tracker showing steps, calories, and a daily progress chart. Use a dark mode theme.
evals.expected_output: A sleek dark mode dashboard with vibrant accent colors for data visualization and modern components.
